assets/bitmaps/replay.png: Song-replay / rhythm-game screen. Music sheet with treble clef on the left; 8 numbered grey buttons (1-8) along the bottom; in the right column: red stop-hand, a blank box (probably score / current-note display), the kid mascot, a diamond status indicator. Layout used while playing a song's notes back.
assets/bitmaps/mus.png: Note-play screen — same layout as replay but with COLOURED 1-8 keys (purple/blue/green/yellow/orange/red/light-purple). This is the instrument-style screen where user presses the matching coloured note. Probably the 'free play' or 'practice' mode.
assets/bitmaps/mus1.png: Song-list menu (matches the first frame of menu1.fli). Hebrew paper-scroll listing the 10 songs. Kid in armchair on the right with a tape recorder/radio. The blank box on the right slot probably shows the currently-highlighted song name or preview.
assets/bitmaps/pan_inst.png: Instrument-selector panel. Paper scroll shows 12 instruments arranged in rows (sax, accordion, piano, frog, guitar, key, microphone, trumpet, bell, baton, etc.). 8 large coloured numeric buttons (1-8) along the bottom. Picking a number plays that instrument's sample.
assets/bitmaps/pll.png: Sprite: the kid mascot leaning on a keyboard / rainbow piano. Used as a small avatar in headers or score boxes.
assets/bitmaps/instr_b.png: Sprite: pipe/saxophone instrument icon. Probably one frame of the instrument cycle in pan_inst.
assets/bitmaps/tmm1.png: Instrument-demo scene: a bear (with accordion) under a tree, birds + sunflower flower. Likely a 'meet the instrument' tableau before / after an instrument sample plays.
assets/bitmaps/tmunki.png: Sprite: smiling sun character. UI decoration / weather mascot.
assets/bitmaps/timer.png: Sprite: small figure with hat (police? checker?). Possibly a 'timer' / countdown character.
assets/bitmaps/volume.png: Settings panel — 4 sliders: 'Music' (musika), 'Narrator' (krayan), 'SFX', and master volume at the bottom. Hebrew title 'שלוט קול' (Sound Control). Stop-hand at top-right to exit. Same as shalat.png; probably one of two language/skin variants.
assets/bitmaps/shalat.png: Settings panel duplicate of volume.png — slider layout for music/narrator/SFX/master volume.
assets/bitmaps/press1.png: UI sprite: number-1 button in pressed (purple/red) state. Used in the colour-number key strip.
assets/bitmaps/notki.png: Tiny note-dot sprite. Probably the moving 'current note' indicator on the music sheet.
assets/bitmaps/igra.png: Game-show stage screen. 4 large window/frame slots (probably for displaying cards/notes), the kid mascot at a colourful keyboard piano. Vertical 'elevator' on the right with stars at the top — likely a score-ladder. Used for the quiz / matching minigame.
assets/bitmaps/igra2.png: Memory/concentration mini-game variant of igra. 12 face-down cards each showing a treble-clef. The score-ladder is a flower/sunflower on the right; the kid mascot stands next to it. Click cards to flip and match.
assets/bitmaps/hlp.bin.png: Unused / placeholder (1×1 pixel). Decoded from hlp.bin which is likely a help-text data file, not an image.
assets/animations/m0.mp4: Main hub room — kid character standing centre. Idle/default state of the home room.
assets/animations/m1.mp4: Main hub room — kid sitting on floor. Idle variant.
assets/animations/m2.mp4: Main hub room — kid on the chair (left side). Idle variant.
assets/animations/m3.mp4: Main hub room — kid in different idle pose (slightly bent / different colour palette).
assets/animations/m4.mp4: Main hub room — kid behind the round table. Idle variant.
assets/animations/m5.mp4: Main hub room — kid facing camera, default greeting pose.
assets/animations/m5_1.mp4: Main hub room m5 variant 1 — slightly different kid expression / pose.
assets/animations/m6.mp4: Main hub room — kid walks over to the gramophone/audio device on the right (selecting song mode?).
assets/animations/m7.mp4: Main hub room — kid back in centre after walking. Likely a 'return from menu' transition.
assets/animations/m8.mp4: Main hub room — kid reaching to one of the right-side devices. Likely 'select song' or 'settings' transition.
assets/animations/muz4.mp4: Main hub variant — kid centre, table foreground. Probably the entry into music/song mode.
assets/animations/menu1.mp4: Song-list menu animation: paper scroll with all 10 song titles in Hebrew slides in, kid in armchair on the right.
assets/animations/menu5.mp4: Song-list menu variant — kid holding a small object (next to the radio). Probably 'song selected, ready to play' state.
assets/animations/menu6.mp4: Song-list menu variant — kid in armchair with the radio. Probably the 'preview the song' state.
assets/animations/play_s.mp4: Song-list menu state: kid holding the radio to his ear (listening to the picked song before committing).
assets/animations/mud1.mp4: Rhythm-game screen intro: empty music sheet + coloured 1-8 buttons appears. The animation shows the screen sliding in / being set up.
assets/animations/not2.mp4: Rhythm-game screen with the kid avatar visible at bottom-right. Same as mud1 layout. Likely played mid-song when user gets a note right.
assets/animations/not3.mp4: Rhythm-game screen with the kid avatar holding a coloured indicator at bottom-right. Likely the 'now play this colour' prompt.
assets/animations/credit.mp4: Credits / intro sequence — same hub room but darkened with purple wash; characters move (possibly authors/credits line scrolling).
assets/animations/konec.mp4: End / finale animation — concert stage with microphone stands and seated audience (yellow eye-pairs in the dark). Played after completing a song or the whole game (Russian 'конец' = 'the end').
assets/animations/da.mp4: Game-show stage 'YES' (correct) feedback animation — Russian 'да'. Kid at the keyboard, 4 score windows above. Played when user answers correctly in the quiz/matching minigame.
assets/animations/net.mp4: Game-show stage 'NO' (wrong) feedback animation — Russian 'нет'. Same layout as da.mp4. Played when user gets the answer wrong.
assets/animations/gramaf1.mp4: Instrument-demo animation: cat-character playing the violin on a red-curtain stage. Played in the instrument browser when violin (skripka) is picked.
assets/animations/gramaf2.mp4: Instrument-demo animation 2 — another animal/character playing an instrument on stage.
assets/animations/gramaf3.mp4: Instrument-demo animation: bunny rabbit playing the drum kit. Picked when user selects drums.
assets/animations/gramaf4.mp4: Instrument-demo animation 4 — another character demonstrating an instrument.
assets/animations/gramaf5.mp4: Instrument-demo animation: bear with accordion (baian) in an outdoor scene with bird + sunflower. Picked when user selects accordion.
assets/animations/durno/kohav1.mp4: Talent-show stage scene — 5 star characters (kochavim) singing under a single star in the sky. Conductor in white on the left. Round 1 of the 'kochavim' (stars) show.
assets/animations/durno/kohav2.mp4: Kochavim round 2 — more stars appear in the sky as the show progresses.
assets/animations/durno/kohav5.mp4: Kochavim round 5 — 5 stars in the sky.
assets/animations/durno/kohav9.mp4: Kochavim round 9 — finale, the sky is full of multi-coloured stars.
assets/animations/eff/fok1.mp4: Hub-room sound-effect animation #1. Likely triggered when user clicks something specific in the room.
assets/animations/eff/menu5.mp4: Menu transition/idle animation #5 — kid holding small radio.
assets/animations/eff/menu6.mp4: Menu transition/idle animation #6 — kid with radio.
assets/songs/aviron.mp4: Song #2 (aviron) — 'הא, אווירון' / 'Plane'. Intro animation (muhad1.fli) + CDDA audio.
assets/songs/taish.mp4: Song #6 (taish) — 'יש לנו תיש' / 'We Have a Goat'.
assets/songs/zebra.mp4: Song #9 (zebra) — 'מדוע הזברה לובשת פיג'מה?' / 'Why Does the Zebra Wear Pyjamas?'.
assets/songs/aliza.mp4: Song #11 (aliza) — 'הילדה הכי יפה בגן' / 'The Prettiest Girl in the Garden'.
assets/songs/track02.opus: CDDA track 2 as standalone Opus — aviron's audio.
assets/songs/track03.opus: CDDA track 3 as standalone Opus — tiktak's audio.
assets/sfx/instruments/1.ogg: Hebrew vocal naming instrument 1 (probably said when user picks button 1 in the instrument panel).
assets/sfx/fx/piano.ogg: Piano instrument sample (the actual sound of the picked instrument).
assets/sfx/fx/crazy.ogg: Comic/'crazy' sting — probably plays during a fail/silly animation.
assets/sfx/fx/konec.ogg: End-of-song / end-of-game jingle (Russian 'конец' = 'end'). Plays during the konec.fli finale.
assets/sfx/fx/kolo_ani.ogg: 'Kolokol' (bell) animation sync sound — plays while the bell sample/animation runs.
assets/sfx/fx/lagu_ani.ogg: Animation sync sound for an instrument (lagu = 'song' in some Slavic dialects, or 'lyagushka' = frog).
assets/sfx/song_names/m_talk.ogg: Narrator general talk #1 — probably an instruction/intro before a song.
assets/sfx/song_names/m_1_1.ogg: Voice intro for song 1 (tiktak) — part 1 (e.g. song name).
assets/sfx/song_names/m_1_2.ogg: Voice intro for song 1 — part 2 (e.g. let's play it).
assets/sfx/menu/fok1.ogg: Menu sound effect 1 (paired with eff/fok1.fli) — probably a click/whoosh.
assets/midi/1.mid: Unnamed MIDI #1 — probably the main-room background loop.
assets/midi/child1.mid: Children's MIDI tune #1 — playable in the 'free play' mode.
assets/midi/classic1.mid: Classical MIDI tune #1 — playable in 'free play'.
assets/midi/drums1.mid: Drum pattern #1 — playable in instrument mode when drums picked.
assets/midi/learn1.mid: Scale-learning MIDI #1 (short — 221 bytes — probably 1 ascending scale).
assets/midi/udar.mid: Single drum-hit MIDI (93 bytes; udar = Russian 'strike'). Sound played on a correct note hit.
assets/midi/victory.mid: Victory jingle — played after completing a song or quiz round.
assets/lyrics/aba.txt: Lyrics for song aba (My Father). CP1255 encoded Hebrew text.
assets/lyrics/taish.txt: Lyrics for song taish (We Have a Goat).
assets/lyrics/zebra.txt: Lyrics for song zebra (Why does the Zebra wear pyjamas).
assets/songdata/songs.json: Master per-song record: cd_track, video file, lyrics_lines (CP1255 decoded), note_count, notes[] with timestamps. Drives both the song-picker UI and the rhythm engine.
assets/songdata/menu_order.json: Song-picker display order from spisok.tem — menu_index 1..10 maps to a .scr filename + Hebrew name.
